case_title: MARK POTTS VS. ROBERTA C PINTO

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY POTTS, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT PINTO, ROBERTA C ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-25-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINTO, ROBERTA C
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-22-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-22-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POTTS, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PINTO, ROBERTA C $5,080.99 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,205.99, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS RECOVERY FOR PROPERTY DAMAGE, PERSONAL PROPERTY LOSS, AND GENERAL AND SPECIFIC DAMAGES FOR BODILY INJURY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PINTO, ROBERTA C
